// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CORE: Organizations, Users, Teams
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

model Organization {
  id            String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  name          String   @db.VarChar(300)
  slug          String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  domain        String?  @db.VarChar(300)
  logo          String?  @db.Text
  settings      Json?    @db.JsonB
  metadata      Json?    @db.JsonB
  status        OrganizationStatus @default(TRIAL)
  createdAt     DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz
  deletedAt     DateTime? @map("deleted_at") @db.Timestamptz

  users         OrganizationUser[]
  projects      Project[]
  clients       Client[]
  invoices      Invoice[]
  orders        Order[]
  products      Product[]
  categories    ProductCategory[]
  cmsPages      CMSPage[]
  blogPosts     BlogPost[]
  events        Event[]
  forms         Form[]
  workflows     Workflow[]
  apiKeys       ApiKey[]
  webhooks      Webhook[]
  featureFlags  FeatureFlag[]
  aiConfigs     AIConfig[]
  aiSessions    AISession[]
  aiPrompts     AIPrompt[]
  aiAgents      AIAgent[]
  aiMemories    AIMemory[]
  aiDocuments   AIDocument[]
  analyticsEvents AnalyticsEvent[]

  @@index([slug])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("organizations")
}

model User {
  id            String    @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  email         String    @unique @db.VarChar(320)
  passwordHash  String?   @map("password_hash") @db.VarChar(300)
  firstName     String?   @map("first_name") @db.VarChar(150)
  lastName      String?   @map("last_name") @db.VarChar(150)
  avatar        String?   @db.Text
  phone         String?   @db.VarChar(30)
  timezone      String?   @default("UTC") @db.VarChar(50)
  locale        String?   @default("en") @db.VarChar(10)
  status        UserStatus @default(PENDING_VERIFICATION)
  emailVerified DateTime? @map("email_verified_at") @db.Timestamptz
  lastLoginAt   DateTime? @map("last_login_at") @db.Timestamptz
  lastLoginIp   String?   @map("last_login_ip") @db.VarChar(45)
  metadata      Json?     @db.JsonB
  settings      Json?     @db.JsonB
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz
  deletedAt     DateTime? @map("deleted_at") @db.Timestamptz

  organizations     OrganizationUser[]
  sessions          Session[]
  notifications     Notification[]
  assignedTasks     Task[] @relation("AssignedTasks")
  createdTasks      Task[] @relation("CreatedTasks")
  comments          Comment[]
  auditLogs         AuditLog[]
  aiSessions        AISession[]   @relation("AISessionUser")
  aiMemories        AIMemory[]    @relation("AIMemoryUser")
  integrations      Integration[] @relation("IntegrationUser")
  cartItems         CartItem[]    @relation("CartItemUser")
  orders            Order[]       @relation("OrderUser")
  apiKeys           ApiKey[]      @relation("ApiKeyUser")

  @@index([email])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("users")
}

model Session {
  id           String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  token        String   @unique @db.VarChar(500)
  ipAddress    String?  @map("ip_address") @db.VarChar(45)
  userAgent    String?  @map("user_agent") @db.Text
  expiresAt    DateTime @map("expires_at") @db.Timestamptz
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz

  userId       String   @map("user_id") @db.Uuid
  user         User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([token])
  @@index([expiresAt])
  @@map("sessions")
}

model OrganizationUser {
  id             String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  role           String   @default("MEMBER") @db.VarChar(50)
  permissions    String[] @default([]) @db.VarChar(100)
  joinedAt       DateTime @default(now()) @map("joined_at") @db.Timestamptz

  organizationId String       @map("organization_id") @db.Uuid
  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId         String       @map("user_id") @db.Uuid
  user           User         @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([organizationId, userId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@map("organization_users")
}

model Team {
  id             String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  name           String   @db.VarChar(200)
  description    String?  @db.Text
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz

  organizationId String       @map("organization_id") @db.Uuid
  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  members        TeamMember[]

  @@index([organizationId])
  @@map("teams")
}

model TeamMember {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  role      String   @default("MEMBER") @db.VarChar(50)
  addedAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("added_at") @db.Timestamptz

  teamId    String   @map("team_id") @db.Uuid
  team      Team     @relation(fields: [teamId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId    String   @map("user_id") @db.Uuid
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([teamId, userId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@map("team_members")
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PROJECT MANAGEMENT
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

model Project {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  name            String   @db.VarChar(300)
  slug            String   @db.VarChar(200)
  description     String?  @db.Text
  status          ProjectStatus @default(DRAFT)
  priority        TaskPriority? @default(MEDIUM)
  startDate       DateTime? @map("start_date") @db.Date
  endDate         DateTime? @map("end_date") @db.Date
  budget          Decimal? @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  spent           Decimal? @default(0) @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  progress        Float?   @default(0)
  metadata        Json?    @db.JsonB
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz
  deletedAt       DateTime? @map("deleted_at") @db.Timestamptz

  organizationId  String       @map("organization_id") @db.Uuid
  organization    Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  managerId       String?      @map("manager_id") @db.Uuid
  manager         User?        @relation(fields: [managerId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  clientId        String?      @map("client_id") @db.Uuid
  client          Client?      @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  tasks           Task[]
  milestones      Milestone[]
  files           ProjectFile[]

  @@unique([slug, organizationId])
  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([managerId])
  @@index([clientId])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("projects")
}

model Milestone {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  name        String   @db.VarChar(300)
  dueDate     DateTime? @map("due_date") @db.Timestamptz
  completedAt DateTime? @map("completed_at") @db.Timestamptz
  sortOrder   Int      @default(0) @map("sort_order")
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz

  projectId   String   @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  project     Project  @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  tasks       Task[]

  @@index([projectId])
  @@map("milestones")
}

model Task {
  id            String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  title         String   @db.VarChar(500)
  description   String?  @db.Text
  status        TaskStatus @default(TODO)
  priority      TaskPriority? @default(MEDIUM)
  dueDate       DateTime? @map("due_date") @db.Timestamptz
  completedAt   DateTime? @map("completed_at") @db.Timestamptz
  estimatedHours Float?  @map("estimated_hours")
  actualHours   Float?   @map("actual_hours")
  sortOrder     Int      @default(0) @map("sort_order")
  metadata      Json?    @db.JsonB
  createdAt     DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz

  projectId     String    @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  project       Project   @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  milestoneId   String?   @map("milestone_id") @db.Uuid
  milestone     Milestone? @relation(fields: [milestoneId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  assigneeId    String?   @map("assignee_id") @db.Uuid
  assignee      User?     @relation("AssignedTasks", fields: [assigneeId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  creatorId     String?   @map("creator_id") @db.Uuid
  creator       User?     @relation("CreatedTasks", fields: [creatorId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  subtasks      SubTask[]
  timeEntries   TimeEntry[]
  comments      Comment[]
  attachments   TaskAttachment[]
  tags          TaskTag[]

  @@index([projectId])
  @@index([assigneeId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([priority])
  @@index([dueDate])
  @@map("tasks")
}

model SubTask {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  title       String   @db.VarChar(500)
  isCompleted Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_completed")
  sortOrder   Int      @default(0) @map("sort_order")
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz

  taskId      String   @map("task_id") @db.Uuid
  task        Task     @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([taskId])
  @@map("sub_tasks")
}

model TimeEntry {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  description String?  @db.Text
  startTime   DateTime @map("start_time") @db.Timestamptz
  endTime     DateTime? @map("end_time") @db.Timestamptz
  duration    Int?     // seconds
  billable    Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz

  taskId      String   @map("task_id") @db.Uuid
  task        Task     @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId      String   @map("user_id") @db.Uuid
  user        User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([taskId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@map("time_entries")
}

model Comment {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  content   String   @db.Text
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz

  taskId    String?  @map("task_id") @db.Uuid
  task      Task?    @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId    String   @map("user_id") @db.Uuid
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([taskId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@map("comments")
}

model TaskAttachment {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  fileName  String   @map("file_name") @db.VarChar(500)
  fileUrl   String   @map("file_url") @db.Text
  fileSize  Int      @map("file_size")
  mimeType  String?  @map("mime_type") @db.VarChar(100)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz

  taskId    String   @map("task_id") @db.Uuid
  task      Task     @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([taskId])
  @@map("task_attachments")
}

model TaskTag {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  name      String   @db.VarChar(100)
  color     String?  @db.VarChar(50)
  taskId    String   @map("task_id") @db.Uuid
  task      Task     @relation(fields: [taskId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([taskId, name])
  @@index([taskId])
  @@map("task_tags")
}

model ProjectFile {
  id        String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  fileName  String   @map("file_name") @db.VarChar(500)
  fileUrl   String   @map("file_url") @db.Text
  fileSize  Int      @map("file_size")
  mimeType  String?  @map("mime_type") @db.VarChar(100)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz

  projectId String   @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  project   Project  @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([projectId])
  @@map("project_files")
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CRM: Clients, Contacts
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

model Client {
  id            String    @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  name          String    @db.VarChar(300)
  company       String?   @db.VarChar(300)
  email         String?   @db.VarChar(320)
  phone         String?   @db.VarChar(30)
  address       String?   @db.Text
  city          String?   @db.VarChar(200)
  country       String?   @db.VarChar(100)
  taxId         String?   @map("tax_id") @db.VarChar(100)
  website       String?   @db.VarChar(500)
  notes         String?   @db.Text
  status        ClientStatus @default(LEAD)
  source        String?   @db.VarChar(200)
  totalRevenue  Decimal?  @default(0) @map("total_revenue") @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  metadata      Json?     @db.JsonB
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz
  deletedAt     DateTime? @map("deleted_at") @db.Timestamptz

  organizationId String       @map("organization_id") @db.Uuid
  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  contacts       Contact[]
  projects       Project[]
  invoices       Invoice[]
  orders         Order[]

  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([email])
  @@map("clients")
}

model Contact {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  firstName   String?  @map("first_name") @db.VarChar(150)
  lastName    String?  @map("last_name") @db.VarChar(150)
  email       String?  @db.VarChar(320)
  phone       String?  @db.VarChar(30)
  position    String?  @db.VarChar(200)
  department  String?  @db.VarChar(200)
  isPrimary   Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_primary")
  status      ContactStatus @default(ACTIVE)
  notes       String?  @db.Text
  metadata    Json?    @db.JsonB
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz

  clientId    String   @map("client_id") @db.Uuid
  client      Client   @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([clientId])
  @@index([email])
  @@map("contacts")
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// INVOICING: Invoices, Payments, Expenses
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

model Invoice {
  id            String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  number        String   @unique @db.VarChar(50)
  description   String?  @db.Text
  subtotal      Decimal  @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  taxRate       Decimal? @default(0) @map("tax_rate") @db.Decimal(5, 2)
  taxAmount     Decimal? @default(0) @map("tax_amount") @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  discount      Decimal? @default(0) @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  total         Decimal  @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  currency      String   @default("RON") @db.VarChar(3)
  status        InvoiceStatus @default(DRAFT)
  issuedDate    DateTime? @map("issued_date") @db.Date
  dueDate       DateTime? @map("due_date") @db.Date
  paidAt        DateTime? @map("paid_at") @db.Timestamptz
  notes         String?  @db.Text
  metadata      Json?    @db.JsonB
  createdAt     DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz

  organizationId String       @map("organization_id") @db.Uuid
  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  clientId       String       @map("client_id") @db.Uuid
  client         Client       @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  projectId      String?      @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  project        Project?     @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  items          InvoiceItem[]
  payments       Payment[]

  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([clientId])
  @@index([projectId])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([number])
  @@map("invoices")
}

model InvoiceItem {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  description String   @db.Text
  quantity    Decimal  @db.Decimal(10, 2)
  unitPrice   Decimal  @map("unit_price") @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  total       Decimal  @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  sortOrder   Int      @default(0) @map("sort_order")

  invoiceId   String   @map("invoice_id") @db.Uuid
  invoice     Invoice  @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([invoiceId])
  @@map("invoice_items")
}

model Payment {
  id            String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  amount        Decimal  @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  method        PaymentMethod @default(BANK_TRANSFER)
  status        PaymentStatus @default(PENDING)
  transactionId String?  @map("transaction_id") @db.VarChar(300)
  gateway       String?  @db.VarChar(50)
  gatewayResponse Json?  @map("gateway_response") @db.JsonB
  paidAt        DateTime? @map("paid_at") @db.Timestamptz
  notes         String?  @db.Text
  createdAt     DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz

  invoiceId     String   @map("invoice_id") @db.Uuid
  invoice       Invoice  @relation(fields: [invoiceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([invoiceId])
  @@index([status])
  @@map("payments")
}

model Expense {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  description String   @db.Text
  amount      Decimal  @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  currency    String   @default("RON") @db.VarChar(3)
  category    String?  @db.VarChar(100)
  expenseDate DateTime? @map("expense_date") @db.Date
  receiptUrl  String?  @map("receipt_url") @db.Text
  metadata    Json?    @db.JsonB
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz

  organizationId String @map("organization_id") @db.Uuid

  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([expenseDate])
  @@map("expenses")
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// E-COMMERCE: Products, Categories, Orders, Carts
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

model ProductCategory {
  id             String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  name           String   @db.VarChar(300)
  slug           String   @db.VarChar(200)
  description    String?  @db.Text
  image          String?  @db.Text
  parentId       String?  @map("parent_id") @db.Uuid
  sortOrder      Int      @default(0) @map("sort_order")
  isActive       Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  metadata       Json?    @db.JsonB
  createdAt      DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt      DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz

  organizationId String          @map("organization_id") @db.Uuid
  organization   Organization    @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  parent         ProductCategory? @relation("CategoryTree", fields: [parentId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  children       ProductCategory[] @relation("CategoryTree")
  products       Product[]
  attributes     ProductCategoryAttribute[]  @relation("ProductCategoryAttributes")

  @@unique([slug, organizationId])
  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([parentId])
  @@map("product_categories")
}

model Product {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  name            String   @db.VarChar(500)
  slug            String   @db.VarChar(300)
  description     String?  @db.Text
  shortDescription String? @map("short_description") @db.VarChar(1000)
  basePrice       Decimal? @map("base_price") @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  costPrice       Decimal? @map("cost_price") @db.Decimal(15, 2)
  sku             String?  @db.VarChar(100)
  barcode         String?  @db.VarChar(100)
  quantity        Int      @default(0)
  weight          Decimal? @db.Decimal(10, 3)
  dimensions      Json?    @db.JsonB // { length, width, height, unit }
  mainImage       String?  @map("main_image") @db.Text
  images          String[] @default([]) @db.Text
  isDigital       Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_digital")
  isActive        Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  isFeatured      Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_featured")
  metadata        Json?    @db.JsonB
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz
  deletedAt       DateTime? @map("deleted_at") @db.Timestamptz

  organizationId  String          @map("organization_id") @db.Uuid
  organization    Organization    @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  categoryId      String?         @map("category_id") @db.Uuid
  category        ProductCategory? @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  variants        ProductVariant[]  @relation("ProductVariants")
  cartItems       CartItem[]
  orderItems      OrderItem[]
  reviews         ProductReview[]
  productImages   ProductImage[]  @relation("ProductImages")
  bundleProducts  BundleProduct[]  @relation("BundleProducts")
  bundles         BundleProduct[]  @relation("BundleParent")

  @@unique([slug, organizationId])
  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([categoryId])

model ProductCategoryAttribute {

model ProductAttribute {

model AIConfig {
  id              String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  name            String   @db.VarChar(200)
  provider        AIProvider @default(OPENAI)
  model           String   @db.VarChar(100)
  modelType       AIModelType @default(CHAT) @map("model_type")

  apiEndpoint     String?  @map("api_endpoint") @db.Text

  maxTokens       Int?     @map("max_tokens")

  defaultSettings Json?    @map("default_settings") @db.JsonB
  isActive        Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  priority        Int      @default(1)
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at") @db.Timestamptz
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at") @db.Timestamptz

  organizationId  String       @map("organization_id") @db.Uuid
  organization    Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  sessions        AISession[]

  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([provider])

}

  id            String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid

  totalTokens   Int      @default(0) @map("total_tokens")

  organizationId String       @map("organization_id") @db.Uuid
  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId         String?      @map("user_id") @db.Uuid
  user           User?        @relation("AISessionUser", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  configId       String?      @map("config_id") @db.Uuid
  config         AIConfig?    @relation(fields: [configId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)

  messages       AIMessage[]

  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([configId])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@map("ai_sessions")
}

model AIMessage {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  role        String   @db.VarChar(50) // user, assistant, system, tool
  content     String   @db.Text
  tokens      Int?
  metadata    Json?    @db.JsonB

  sessionId   String   @map("session_id") @db.Uuid
